market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
articles.description: Stainless, a New York-based startup, will wind down all hosted products as part of the acquisition.

articles.title: Revolut wants to take Dogecoin mainstream with its new physical payment card
articles.description: The European fintech giant is launching a physical debit card that lets users spend the popular meme coin anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted with zero extra exchange fees.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/18: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
articles.description: Bitcoin dropped to the crucial $76,000 support level while large-cap altcoins sold off sharply. Do technical charts suggest that traders will buy the dip?

articles.title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
articles.description: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.

articles.title: Solana is shedding its memecoin reputation as big banks move billions into its ecosystem
articles.description: Wall Street and payment giants are quietly taking over Solana, moving billions onto the network for tokenized funds and global payments even as the broader crypto market cools down, according to a new report by Messari.

articles.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
articles.description: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

articles.title: The Ethereum Foundation is facing a wave of high-profile departures as its internal shakeup deepens
articles.description: The turnover comes as the foundation undergoes an internal transition tied to a new organizational mandate aimed at redefining its role within Ethereum.

articles.title: Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy receives New York BitLicense for institutional crypto push
articles.description: Galaxy Digital became the second company this year to secure a New York BitLicense, following Strike’s approval in March.

articles.title: Crypto funds see $1B in outflows as Iran tensions revive risk-off sentiment
articles.description: Institutional investors pulled capital from Bitcoin and Ether products as Iran tension and rising inflation rattled markets, while XRP and Solana funds continued to attract fresh inflows.

articles.title: NYC Health + Hospitals says hackers stole medical data and fingerprints during breach affecting at least 1.8 million people
articles.description: The New York public healthcare system said hackers stole personal and medical data, and scans of biometrics — including fingerprints — in one of the largest recorded breaches of 2026.

articles.title: Stripe-backed Tempo taps $7.5 billion DeFi lender Morpho to expand beyond payments
articles.description: The move brings onchain yield and lending to the payments-focused chain in a bid to offer full-stack onchain finance platform to companies building on it.

articles.title: Ethereum traders say bears ‘in control’ after ETH price drop to $2K
articles.description: Ether price fell sharply below $2,100 as increasing sell pressure on Binance and persistent ETF outflows fueled bearish momentum.

articles.title: HIVE buys $58 million Toronto plot for AI facility; shares climb
articles.description: The bitcoin mining firm continues on its investment path into AI data centers after raising $115 million to expand its global footprint in the industry.

articles.title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
articles.description: The app is similar to a meeting notetaker — you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family and friends if you want to.

articles.title: Hyperliquid eyes 55% price rise after Silicon Valley investor's 'massive HYPE buy'
articles.description: A bullish long-term chart pattern puts HYPE on track for a potential rally above $70 this year, with a16z-linked accumulation and fresh institutional catalysts strengthening the case.

articles.title: Ex-OpenAI's Leopold Aschenbrenner bets big on crypto miners for his $13.6 billion AI play
articles.description: Aschenbrenner is shorting Nvidia and AMD in favor of bitcoin miners that own the electricity and data centers needed to fuel the next phase of the AI boom.

articles.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
articles.description: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.

articles.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
articles.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin gives up all of May's gains, slipping below $77,000
articles.description: Strategy made a mammoth $2 billion bitcoin purchase last week, but it's not lifting crypto spirits or prices.

articles.title: Bitcoin Depot stock crashes 71% premarket after Chapter 11 filing
articles.description: Bitcoin Depot files for Chapter 11 in Texas, plans asset sale and wind-down as regulatory pressure forces shutdown of its Bitcoin ATM network.
